supersedes: Legacy fixture-era Q-00/Q-01/Q-02 placeholder semantics for new live emissions
principle: Q-classes are governance classifications of grounding state; not probabilistic AI confidence

q_classes.name: PARTIAL_GROUNDING_WITH_STRUCTURAL_CONTINUITY
q_classes.executive_note: Semantic continuity is validated. Some semantic domains lack structural backing; advisory confirmation is mandatory before executive commitment on partially grounded surfaces.
disclosure_required: unresolved_semantic_gaps must be enumerated on the rendering metadata
advisory confirmation requirement must be visibly stated
q_classes.compat_note: Aligns with the legacy adapter's 'Partial Grounding' semantics; new label is the governance-true language.

q_classes.name: SEMANTIC_ONLY
q_classes.executive_note: Structural backing is absent. Only semantic continuity supports the projection. Executive caution mandatory.
disclosure_required: absence of structural backing must be explicitly stated as the reason
q_classes.compat_note: Legacy adapter Q-02 was 'Structural View Only' (inverse of new Q-03). Surfaces consuming the legacy adapter for Q-03 emissions MUST override the tooltip with the new meaning.

q_classes.name: UNAVAILABLE
q_classes.executive_note: Evidence is unavailable. No semantic projection is permitted.

prohibited: Never derive Q-01 from semantic continuity alone
Never emit Q-02 without recording unresolved_semantic_gaps
Never emit Q-03 without explicit absence-of-structural-backing reason
Never collapse Q-04 into Q-03 to avoid disclosure

compat_mapping.purpose: Allow legacy fixture-era adapters and tests to continue functioning while the live payload emits the new governance class
compat_mapping.rule: Top-level qualifier_class carries the legacy adapter class; qualifier_summary.qualifier_class carries the new governance class. Live executive surfaces MUST display the new class with contract-mandated language.
